page_content:
ARTH357 History of Photography (3 Credits)

An exploration of the historical, social, aesthetic, and technological developments of the photographic medium and its relationship to other modes of visual representation in the creation of the modern world. Credit Only Granted for. ARTH357 or ARTH457.

ARTH359 Film as Art (3 Credits)

The study of film as a visual art, from theoretical, cultural and aesthetic perspectives. Content varies by semester.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
